title: 竞品阵地防守
description: 从客户活跃度和流失角度分析阵地防守情况，识别客户流失风险

kpis.label: 总客户数
kpis.sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT customer_code) as v FROM sales_delivery WHERE strftime('%Y%m', deliv_crt_time) IN ('202601','202602','202603') AND deliv_retrngds_identfctn IS NULL
kpis.help: 近3个月有提货记录的客户总数

kpis.label: 活跃客户数
kpis.sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT customer_code) as v FROM sales_delivery WHERE strftime('%Y%m', deliv_crt_time)='202603' AND deliv_retrngds_identfctn IS NULL
kpis.help: 本月有提货记录的客户数

kpis.label: 客户流失率
kpis.sql: SELECT ROUND((COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN strftime('%Y%m', deliv_crt_time)='202602' THEN customer_code END) - COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN strftime('%Y%m', deliv_crt_time)='202603' THEN customer_code END))*100.0/NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN strftime('%Y%m', deliv_crt_time)='202602' THEN customer_code END),0),1) as v FROM sales_delivery WHERE strftime('%Y%m', deliv_crt_time) IN ('202602','202603') AND deliv_retrngds_identfctn IS NULL
kpis.help: 上月有提货、本月无提货的客户占上月客户数的比例

kpis.label: 单客户平均量
kpis.sql: SELECT ROUND(SUM(deliv_qty_mt)/NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT customer_code),0),2) as v FROM sales_delivery WHERE strftime('%Y%m', deliv_crt_time)='202603' AND deliv_retrngds_identfctn IS NULL
kpis.help: 本月活跃客户的平均提货量

stages.title: 分公司客户活跃
stages.description: 各分公司的客户活跃数与流失情况
stages.sql: SELECT brnch_descrptn as 分公司, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN strftime('%Y%m', deliv_crt_time)='202603' THEN customer_code END) as 本月活跃客户, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN strftime('%Y%m', deliv_crt_time)='202602' THEN customer_code END) as 上月活跃客户, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN strftime('%Y%m', deliv_crt_time)='202602' AND customer_code NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT customer_code FROM sales_delivery WHERE strftime('%Y%m', deliv_crt_time)='202603' AND deliv_retrngds_identfctn IS NULL) THEN customer_code END) as 流失客户数 FROM sales_delivery WHERE strftime('%Y%m', deliv_crt_time) IN ('202602','202603') AND deliv_retrngds_identfctn IS NULL GROUP BY brnch_descrptn ORDER BY 流失客户数 DESC
stages.insight_focus: 哪些分公司客户流失最严重？是否需要重点防守？

stages.title: 产线客户分布
stages.description: 各产线的客户数量与提货集中度
stages.sql: SELECT deliv_prodctnline_descrptn as 产线, COUNT(DISTINCT customer_code) as 客户数, ROUND(SUM(deliv_qty_mt),1) as 提货量_吨, ROUND(SUM(deliv_qty_mt)/NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT customer_code),0),2) as 单客户均量_吨 FROM sales_delivery WHERE strftime('%Y%m', deliv_crt_time)='202603' AND deliv_retrngds_identfctn IS NULL GROUP BY deliv_prodctnline_descrptn ORDER BY 客户数 DESC
stages.insight_focus: 各产线客户基数如何？单客户均量是否健康？

stages.title: 客户量级分层
stages.description: 按提货量将客户分为大/中/小层级，分析各层级贡献
stages.sql: SELECT CASE WHEN qty >= 100 THEN 'A-大客户(>=100t)' WHEN qty >= 10 THEN 'B-中客户(10-100t)' ELSE 'C-小客户(<10t)' END as 客户层级, COUNT(*) as 客户数, ROUND(SUM(qty),1) as 提货量_吨, ROUND(SUM(qty)*100.0/NULLIF((SELECT SUM(deliv_qty_mt) FROM sales_delivery WHERE strftime('%Y%m', deliv_crt_time)='202603' AND deliv_retrngds_identfctn IS NULL),0),1) as 占比_pct FROM (SELECT customer_code, SUM(deliv_qty_mt) as qty FROM sales_delivery WHERE strftime('%Y%m', deliv_crt_time)='202603' AND deliv_retrngds_identfctn IS NULL GROUP BY customer_code) GROUP BY 客户层级 ORDER BY 客户层级
stages.insight_focus: 客户结构是否健康？大客户依赖度是否过高？小客户是否有增长空间？

summary_prompt: 根据以上竞品阵地防守分析数据（分公司客户活跃、产线客户分布、客户量级分层），请以市场竞争视角总结：1)客户流失情况与风险区域，2)客户结构特点，3)建议的2个防守行动项。不超过150字。
